overall.description: A ship simulator game showing a first-person view from the bridge of a vessel navigating through a harbor at night during a storm. The scene features operational navigation displays including radar and chart plotters, with occasional lightning flashes illuminating the dark waters ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge navigation station with electronic displays

agents.ego_description: operating the ship's navigation systems, monitoring the radar and chart displays while maneuvering through the harbor channel

entered.detail: electronic chart display showing harbor map with depth contours and vessel position
rotating radar screen showing land masses and navigation hazards
depth sounder display showing water depth profile
metal window frame with support mullions surrounding the forward view
the bow of the vessel with deck railings and navigation lights visible through the window
dark water surface of the harbor visible beyond the ship's bow

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a stable view from the ship's bridge navigation station. Three electronic displays show chart, radar, and depth information while the vessel cruises forward through the dark harbor waters. The interior is lit by the glow of the navigation screens, and the bow of the ship is visible through the forward windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge navigation station during storm conditions

events.description: bright lightning flash illuminates the right side of the harbor through the bridge window
lightning flash illuminates the left side of the harbor as the storm continues

agents.ego_description: continuing to navigate through the harbor while monitoring the radar for obstacles during the storm

segments.scene_description: The vessel continues navigating through the harbor as the storm intensifies with visible lightning strikes. The navigation displays remain active, with the radar continuously sweeping to track the vessel's position relative to the harbor channels. Brief flashes of lightning illuminate the dark waters outside the bridge windows.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady perspective from the ship's bridge as a calm night navigation evolves into a volatile storm. It begins with a stable view of the navigation station, where the glow of electronic chart, radar, and depth displays illuminates the interior while the vessel cruises through dark harbor waters. As the ship continues forward, the atmosphere shifts and the storm intensifies, bringing sudden flashes of lightning that momentarily brighten the darkness outside the forward windows. The scene then focuses on the active radar sweeping to track the vessel's position relative to the harbor channels, with the intermittent lightning strikes creating a stark contrast against the steady light of the bridge instruments.
